content.full_text:
January 28, 2004

Katrina Maczen-Cantrell
Shasta County Democratic Central Committee Member
PO Box 254
Round Mountain, CA 96084

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-04-009

Dear Ms. Maczen-Cantrell:

Pursuant to our telephone conversation of January 23, 2004, you have rescinded your request for written advice.

As we discussed, the Political Reform Act, which we interpret and enforce, does not address the issue raised in your letter.

If you have any additional questions, please feel free to call me toll-free at 866/275-3772.

Sincerely,

Kevin S. Moen, PhD
Political Reform Consultant II
Technical Assistance Division
